Name: -1_campus_food_lunch_options
Representative_Docs: ['the only options for purchasing food on my campus is the bookstore snacks drinks and prepackaged items and the academy kitchen which exists mainly to provide school breakfast and lunch to an early college high school population honestly i never purchase or eat food from either rather i bring my lunch or go home for lunch', 'as far as i know our campus does not have a cafeteria or food court of any kind it would be a great benefit to the faculty staff students if there were healthy food options on campus in addition including a meal plan as part of the free tuition initiative would help those students or staff struggling with food security the school does a lot to hold events and provide food to the community and students who attend however there is no sustained availability of food offered through the college', 'food availability is not great i always pack my lunch i see many of my students eating lunch from vending machines on campus rather than paying the higher prices for the food available at the cafe']

Name: 1_healthy_campus_food_options
Representative_Docs: ['not a lot of healthy food options on campus i pack my own food', 'the cafeteria food we serve our students is shockingly poor quality very similar to the food the public schools serve my son and other k12 students prepackaged even hard boiled eggs for petes sake on which you can taste the chemical preservative because the eggshell is already peeled truckedin plastic bags cut open and heated there is almost no fresh preparation of items so student choose the frozenflash fried options because they taste better such as the fries and hamburgers which are available every day not even the hamburger patties are made on sight i guess because it is cheaper to buy them premade than to pay a student worker a living wage to make fresh food they make one hot item that meets the nutritional standards each day but it is put together from bagged and canned ingredients only the lettuce is reasonably fresh most days we have only one other food option on campus a bagel shop you can get some healthy fresh bagel sandwiches there as well as fruit smoothies and i am grateful for that but it is pretty expensive for students', 'there should be more healthy food available throughout campus and not just in the campus cafeteria students often complain about the poor choices available to them at the campus cafeteria especially for those who would like to eat more fresh fruits and vegetables and whole foods there are not any quick serve healthy options on campus only bagels and wings']

Name: 3_food_campus_no food_students
Representative_Docs: ['students and staff need more food choices across campus more food service vendors are needed in the food court by zuhl library there are several stalls that are vacant and the existing vendors have erratic hours also the food offerings at the zuhl fuel coffee stand are inconsistent some days there is a good selection for breakfast and lunch and other days there is no food at all food service shuts down entirely at the food court and zuhl in between sessions making it difficult for staff and students to get meals on campus at all', 'unmg does not have adequate food services for nonhigh school students the mckinley academy kitchen is available to high school students with limited availability to nonhigh school students it has been years since food services were offered to all students faculty and staff at unmg the nonhigh school students need to either eat before they come to campus or bring meals with them if nothing else let food trucks park on campus this is unconscionable', 'no food availability on campus whatsoever']
